content.en:
Ye Tian absorbed these Innocent Source Wood Liquids, and the speed at which the Origin on the other side was raised was indeed far greater than before, but it was not very fast.

"Sure enough, even if there is an Innocent Source Wood Liquid, it is impossible to quickly raise the Origin of the Other Shore in a short period of time. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, with these Innocent Source Wood Liquid, his other Origin would still improve a lot.

After a period of time, Ye Tian refined more than one hundred and sixty Innocent Source Wood, and refined all the Innocent Source Wood Liquid.

After that, he tried to copy the body of the Innocent Australopithecus and blend in with the Innocent Australopithecus family, but every time he was discovered, he couldn't get much Innocent Source Wood at all.

After these Innocent Source Wood Liquids were exhausted, he had to find resources again, and he couldn't count on these Innocent Source Wood Liquids.

......

Passage of time passed.

Before you know it, more than 100,000 primeval eras have passed.

It took Ye Tian all these years to completely refine all the Innocent Source Wood Liquid.

He tested it, and the Origin of the Other Shore had reached more than 8.5 million, which had improved a lot, but it was still a lot short of the 10 million Origin Origin of the Other Shore in the middle of the Origin Upper Realm.

And in the short term, he is not ready to continue looking for resources.

He was going to do something else, and that was to deal with the Shadow Ruins.

Last time.

He allowed him to enter the Shadow Ruins, and although he caused the Shadow Ruins to suffer heavy losses, it did not hurt the true foundation of the Shadow Ruins.

The real foundation of the Shadow Ruins is those Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors and the few Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors who have the hope of breaking through to the Origin Upper Realm, as long as these few people have nothing to do, then the Shadow Ruins will not be considered to be broken.

Shadow Ruins has killed a lot of Terran Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and he won't stop there.

He is the Lord of Justice, and last time it was just a small revenge.

Now that he has become the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, he has enough strength, so he naturally wants to continue to take revenge on the Shadow Ruins.

According to his understanding, the strength of the three Origin Upper Realms of the Shadow Ruins was not too strong, and the most powerful one was only in the middle stage of the Origin Upper Realm, and he didn't even have a late stage of the Origin Upper Realm.

But.

The Shadow Ruins are in the Shadow Ruins, and the Origin Upper Realm of the Eternal Land will enter the Shadow Ruins, and their strength will be suppressed, which is the reason why Wind Tooth Island and other forces dare not invade the Shadow Ruins.

But Ye Tian had a way to deal with the Shadow Ruins.

......

Shadow Ruins.

Eastern.

At this time, the strongest Origin Middle Realm sitting in the eastern part of the country is the Lord of the Shadow Ruins, and his strength is also quite good, if it is compared according to the strength, it is probably equivalent to the strength of the Lord of Qingyun.

After Ye Tian came to the Shadow Ruins, he came to the eastern branch of the Shadow Ruins, and he first wanted to destroy the eastern branch of the Shadow Ruins.

But.

He will not use his true body to destroy this branch, but will use the Lord of the Infant of the Dragon River to destroy the eastern branch of the Shadow Ruins.

Ju Ying's cultivation is not high, and the origin of the other side is not as good as him.

Therefore, Ye Tian can copy Ju Ying's body.

Moreover, he had seen Ju Ying before, and he could copy his body.

All conditions are met.

So, Ye Tian began to copy Ju Ying's body.

Soon, Ju Ying's body copy was successful.

Although it is an unfamiliar copy body, the top other side supreme technique can be cast, and the other side of the origin rule realm can also play a ninety percent realm.

It's just that there is no treasure on the other side, and the strength of the body is not as good as the real body replicating the body.

However, he can still exert a very strong strength, and in the ruins of shadows, he will not be limited in strength.

......

Eastern part of the Shadow Ruins.

The Lord of the Screwtooth is in retreat, regardless of the trivial matters of the outside world.

And many of the things that happened before the primeval era have long been forgotten by the Lord of the Screwtooth, and they will not think that the Dragon River dares to invade them again, after all, the high-level of both sides have negotiated an armistice.

Although the relationship is still not good, there will be no more battles between the Dragon River and the Shadow Ruins.

But at this moment.

A terrifying hand crushed towards the entire eastern part of the Shadow Ruins.

Buzz Buzz!!!!

One by one, the circles automatically activated, trying to fend off the big hand.

However.

Click!!

One after another, the magic circles shattered, and they couldn't stop this big hand at all.

At this time.

A Venerable Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor was terrified, and they recognized that the aura of this big hand came from an existence in the Origin Upper Realm!

"No!"

A Venerable Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor shouted in despair.

Bang bang bang!!

A Venerable Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor was crushed and turned into powder.

In an instant, the entire Eastern Division was shattered, and only a few of the Origin Middle Realm survived.

They immediately called for help from the Shadow Ruins headquarters and began to flee.

As for fighting desperately with the Origin Upper Realm, they are not stupid.

But even if you run away, there is no hope of survival.

After all, they are too weak, how can they resist Ye Tian!

Puff puff puff!!

Before several Origin Middle Realm people had time to escape, they were easily pierced through their bodies by Ye Tian with a spear in their hands, killing them in seconds.

Even the Lord of the Screws didn't run away, but he still knew who had done it, and he passed the word on.

"The Lord of the Babies !!!"

He was furious.

I don't understand why the Lord of the Infants, who had signed an agreement to no longer fight against the Shadow Ruins, would break the agreement and destroy the eastern part of their Shadow Ruins.

What good will this do to the Dragon River, if the two sides fight, the Dragon River will also suffer heavy losses, and everyone will end up together at most.

However.

He didn't have a chance to think about it.

Ye Tian blasted it to death with one blow, leaving no trace.

At this point, this eastern division was completely destroyed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here directly, and there was no scraping resources.

It's just a branch, and there won't be many good things, and he can't look at them now.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian hid and waited for things to develop.

......

Shadow Ruins.

The Lord of the Shadow was the first to know about the Eastern Division, and rushed over as soon as possible.

However, when he arrived, he was still a step too late.

"The Lord of the Babies !!"

The Lord of the Shadow Circle was extremely angry, he was eager to kill the Dragon River immediately, but it was impossible for him to destroy the Dragon River and the Lord of Ju Ying by his own strength, and if he was besieged by the three Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Upper Realm of the Dragon River, he would also be in danger.

Thereupon.

He returned to the Shadow Ruins headquarters, preparing to discuss with the other two Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins to see how to deal with them and take revenge on the Dragon River.

Soon.

The other two Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors all came.

The other two Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins were the Lord of Xuanyin and the Lord of Taihe, and these two Origin Upper Realm also knew the information at this time, and they were also very angry.

One branch, so many Origin Realms have all been destroyed, which makes the Shadow Ruins suffer extremely heavy losses!
